EF
Private border editor

No crop. No upload. No account.

EasyFrame

Borders for photos and videos|

Resize photos and videos for social posts by adding clean frames instead of cropping. Everything is processed privately on your device.

  • 8 ratiosOriginal, square, story, landscape
  • Custom colorUse presets or pick your own
  • Batch photosMultiple images, one video at a time

Studio

Customize export

Adjust the final canvas without cropping your original media.

Aspect ratio

Border color

Border size 8%

Designed for fast, private media framing.
